sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('N', 'w', 'c', 'p'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        if n['pixels'] <= 20 or n['color'] == 'p':
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, center={center}")

# Compare with previous state

# After RIGHT: need to check which one moved
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
